title: Users may have experienced delays and saw failures with multiple functions in Microsoft Defender
impact: Users may have experienced delays and saw failures with multiple functions in Microsoft Defender.

updates.content:
Title: Users may experience delays and see failures with multiple functions in Microsoft Defender

User impact: Users may experience delays and see failures with multiple functions in Microsoft Defender.

More info: Some users may experience delays and failures with the following functions:
- Threat Explorer
- Defender Portal explorer
- Email entity
- Advanced hunting

Current status: We’ve identified that users may experience delays and failures in Threat Explorer, Defender Portal explorer, Email entity, and Advanced hunting.  While we've taken steps to resolve this issue, we’re monitoring the affected infrastructure to determine if additional remediation will be required, or if the service needs additional time to stabilize. 

Scope of impact: This event could impact some Microsoft Defender users serviced through North America, who are attempting to utilize functions such as Threat Explorer, Defender Portal explorer, Email entity, and Advanced hunting. This section may be updated as our investigation continues.

Start time: Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 6:00 PM UTC

Root cause: Increased traffic to a portion of the service infrastructure is causing failures for users who are attempting to utilize functions such as Threat Explorer, Defender Portal explorer, Email entity, and Advanced hunting and is resulting in this impact.

Next update by: Saturday, April 18, 2026, at 6:00 AM UTC

Title: Users may have experienced delays and saw failures with multiple functions in Microsoft Defender

User impact: Users may have experienced delays and saw failures with multiple functions in Microsoft Defender. 

More info: Some users may have experienced delays and failures with the following functions: 

- Threat Explorer
- Defender Portal explorer
- Email entity
- Advanced hunting 
 
Final status: We've cleared the resulting processing backlog requests and confirmed, following a period of monitoring service health telemetry, that impact has now been remediated. 
 
Scope of impact: This issue may have impacted some Microsoft Defender users serviced through North America attempting to utilize functions such as Threat Explorer, Defender Portal explorer, Email entity, and Advanced hunting. 
 
Start time: Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 5:30 PM UTC
 
End time: Monday, April 20, 2026, at 6:30 AM UTC
 
Root cause: Increased traffic to a portion of the service infrastructure caused requests to queue, resulting in delays and failures for some actions. 
 
Next steps:
- We're analyzing performance data and trends on the affected infrastructure to help prevent this problem from happening again. 

This is the final update for the event.
